heading: Time limitation on completion of affairs of Commission
label: 1643i Time limitation on completion of affairs of Commission
text: The Commission shall complete its affairs in connection with the settlement of claims pursuant to this subchapter not later than .July 6, 1972
notes: Amendments1969— set , as the final date for the settlement of claims pursuant to this subchapter.Pub. L. 91–157July 6, 19721966— inserted “with respect to each respective claims program authorized” after “carrying out its functions”.Pub. L. 89–780
